design_philosophy: A premium, production-style marketing website for Prithvix (AgriTech dealer management app). It feels like a serious premium AgriTech SaaS brand built for rural commerce. Earthy, grounded, trustworthy, modern, and cinematic. Breaking the generic 'startup' aesthetic by embracing organic depth, textured gradients, and high-end editorial typography mixed with high-tech 3D elements.

primary.description: Deep forest green. Used for primary branding, buttons in light mode, and major structural accents.

accent.description: Warm gold. Used for glowing effects, highlighting key metrics, premium pricing tiers, and subtle borders.

rules: Headings (Playfair Display) must be tracked tightly.
Overlines/labels must use JetBrains Mono, uppercase, wide tracking.
Body text (Plus Jakarta Sans) must be highly readable with relaxed leading.
Never center paragraphs. Left-align dense content.

spacing_and_layout.borders: Always use 1px subtle borders to define edges. border-[rgba(26,60,43,0.1)] in light mode.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons must shift background color slightly and scale slightly (scale-105) on hover. Cards should gently translate up (-translate-y-1) and cast a diffuse shadow.
motion_and_interactions.splash_screen: Requires a dramatic logo reveal using framer-motion (scale up, fade in) against a dark earthy background (#0E1A14). Needs an 'Enter Experience' interactive button that slides the splash screen up to reveal the site.

components_strategy.header: Crystal glassmorphism sticky header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F5F0E8]/70 in light sections, bg-[#0E1A14]/70 in dark sections). Must have a subtle 1px bottom border.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary CTA uses deep forest green (#1A3C2B) in light mode and warm gold (#D4A853) in dark mode. Secondary buttons should be outline with blurred backgrounds.
components_strategy.forms_and_modals: Use Shadcn 'Dialog' for the 'Request a Demo' contact form. Use Shadcn 'Input' and 'Button'. Form should be minimalist with floating labels or very clean left-aligned labels.
components_strategy.carousel: Use Shadcn 'Carousel' for the testimonials. Style it with 'Editorial Ribbon' aesthetic—generous spacing, Playfair Display quotes.
components_strategy.marquees: Slow, organic drift using react-fast-marquee. Used for sponsor logos or an editorial ribbon separator.

3d_scene_instructions.description: A 'Living Crop Intelligence Terrain'. Isometric or slightly angled perspective. An abstract digital agricultural field.
3d_scene_instructions.geometry: Use planes with displacement maps or instanced meshes (boxes/cylinders) representing crops.
3d_scene_instructions.materials: MeshStandardMaterial with wireframe=true for some elements to give a 'tech/hologram' feel. Deep greens and glowing gold elements.
3d_scene_instructions.effects: Floating particles using <Points>. Soft glowing lighting using PointLights with gold (#D4A853) colors. A dark background (#0E1A14) overlay on the canvas so UI text pops over it.
3d_scene_instructions.fallback: If 3D rendering is complex or fails, use the 'hero_3d_terrain' image from the media block with a slow scale animation.

sections_breakdown.splash_screen: Fullscreen. Background #0E1A14. Prithvix logo centered in Playfair Display (text-6xl). 'Enter' button triggers exit animation.
sections_breakdown.hero: R3F canvas behind the content. Overlay gradients so text is readable. Title: 'Cultivating Rural Commerce'. Subtitle: 'The AI-powered dealer management platform for agricultural input distributors.' CTAs: Request Demo (solid gold), Watch How It Works (glass outline).
sections_breakdown.features: 6 features presented via Bento Grid (Mode A) or Sticky Scroll. Feature 1: Farmer Registration & QR ID. Feature 2: Field Visit Logging. Feature 3: AI Product Recommendations. Feature 4: Udhaar/Credit Ledger. Feature 5: Inventory Alerts. Feature 6: Multilingual Agronomist Chat. Mix photography and UI cards.
sections_breakdown.stats: Dark section (#0E1A14 background). Animated counters using framer-motion. Example stats: '10M+ Farmers Registered', '50K+ Dealers', '$2B+ Credit Managed'. Accents in gold.
sections_breakdown.how_it_works: 4-step vertical chronological flow. Minimalist line-art or tech nodes connecting steps.
sections_breakdown.pricing: Side-by-side cards. Basic (Light) vs Premium (Dark). Premium uses 'feature_accent' background texture.
sections_breakdown.testimonials: Shadcn Carousel. Off-white background. Elegant serif quotes.
sections_breakdown.footer: Dark mode (#0E1A14). Massive 'PRITHVIX' text at the bottom. Link columns and legal.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure gold text on off-white has sufficient contrast, darken if necessary. White text on dark green must meet APCA standards.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='splash-enter-btn', data-testid='hero-demo-cta', data-testid='pricing-premium-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install framer-motion, @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, and lucide-react before starting.
Setup Tailwind config with the specified colors, fonts (Playfair Display, Plus Jakarta Sans, JetBrains Mono), and textures.
For the Splash Screen, use AnimatePresence to unmount it entirely once the 'Enter' button is clicked.
Build the 3D scene inside a dedicated component to keep the Hero clean. If R3F causes issues, fallback instantly to the hero_3d_fallback image.
Use standard raw HTML + Tailwind for creative grids in the Feature section. Do not rely heavily on generic Shadcn cards.
Integrate Shadcn Dialog for the Demo CTA.
ONLY use the images provided in the 'media' object. Never use placeholders.
Apply 'background-image: url(...)' for the textures provided, combined with background-blend-mode: multiply or overlay for depth.
